title: The fapdos Update
description: A modpack made to represent the vision of what would Minecraft look like if fapdos were the one to develop it
body:
Have any suggestion? Want to report a bug? We have a Discord server! You can join and ask anything you want!


Introduction

This modpack is made so most mods created by fapdos are together in one same pack. These mods were developped thinking about either being played together or they just fit to play together with them.

Most of the additions are meant to feel vanilla-like, even if some things don't seem vanilla enough, most of them are. Having a bit of creativity outside of the limits isn't a bad thing after all.

This modpack includes insects that roam around to give more ambience to it, you can find ant nests, but be careful with them! You can also find a mysterious cult of cats! New monsters during the night, new additions to the Nether... and more!

 

 

If you have any issues, questions, suggestions or want to share your experience playing this modpack, you can join our Discord server!

 

 
 
 
 

Sponsored by BisectHosting! Click on this text right here to get there and use code ''fapdos'' for a 25% OFF your next purchase!

 

 

Consider following me on my socials! Click on the image or in here to get there.
